uw-seattle-psychology::bachelor-of-arts.recommendedTrackSummary: APreN-DTA/MRP is the current closest Green River transfer path for this degree because it matches 4 of the 9 degree-specific Green River classes currently tracked for this major.
whyThisTrack: APreN-DTA/MRP has the strongest direct overlap with the current degree-specific Green River class list, including PSYC& 100, BIOL& 241, BIOL& 242, MATH 147.

This auto-match compares every hardcoded course in the current Green River transfer tracks against the major's tracked Green River classes and keeps the track with the highest concrete course overlap.
Use the remaining major-specific checklist items to add the classes that APreN-DTA/MRP does not cover by itself.
